description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a long cylindrical barrel and a prominent tubular magazine beneath it. The receiver is angular and blocky, with a visible ejection port and a rail or mounting point on top. The grip is a pistol-style handle, ergonomically shaped for secure handling, and there is a short, folding or fixed foregrip beneath the barrel for added stability. The rear of the shotgun lacks a traditional full stock, instead terminating in a compact, squared-off end, possibly for easier maneuverability in tight urban environments. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a non-reflective, tactical appearance suitable for law enforcement or security use.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a long barrel, pistol grip, and compact rear, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, pistol grip, and compact rear; the foregrip and mounting rail are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, front sight, and the alignment of the tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, pistol grip, and the overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the squared-off end, rear sight, and the symmetry of the receiver and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
